lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, who are you?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: I'm Nigel. It is my job to tell you about Deadman Mode.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you grant me access to Deadman: Annihilation?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Well, yes, but there's some information you're going to want first.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Now, if you wouldn't mind signing a few waivers...

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Very well. To complete your conversion, you will need to switch to a Deadman: Annihilation world.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: If you leave Lumbridge, speak to me again, or log back in to a Permanent Deadman world, your account conversion will be cancelled.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: And yes, I'm making you choose a world yourself. This is a big decision, you know!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a question about Deadman mode.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: What would you like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Deadman mode is an incredibly dangerous survival game mode. Anyone can attack anyone, anywhere. Death comes at a huge cost and killing other players can be extremely lucrative.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lucrative, you say?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Killing a player will earn you all of the items they had on them, plus the 10 most valuable items from their bank. The unfortunate soul will also lose half of their experience in most skills, or a quarter if they were not skulled. Regardless, it's quite the set-back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, that is brutal!

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: It is, but it is no simple task to kill someone in Deadman mode.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Very high level guards patrol every major city and bank. They will kill anyone who has a skull. Getting yourself a kill is only half the battle.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I play Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: You can log into Deadman mode by selecting a Deadman mode world from the world list before you log in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I don't need a new account to play Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Nope! You can use your existing account on a Deadman world, providing you have membership.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do my stats and items transfer over to Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: No, they do not. Your Deadman mode progress is completely separate from normal Old School worlds.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happens when I die in Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: If you die to a player you will lose the 10 most valuable stacks of items from your bank, all items that you have on your person and half of the experience you have gained in any unprotected skills.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: If you die to a monster when you have a PK skull you will lose the 10 most valuable stacks of items from your bank, all items that you have on your person and half of the experience you have gained in any unprotected skills.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: If you die to a monster when you do not have a PK skull you will lose all of the items on your person except for the 3 most valuable. You will not lose experience or any items from your bank.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happens when I kill a player in Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: When you kill a player you will receive any items they have on their person and you will also be given a key. You can use this key on Deadman chests found in various banks across the map. Within the chest you will

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: find the 10 most valuable stacks of items from the bank of the player you struck down. From here you will be able to choose the items you would like to keep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I protect my items in Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: You can protect up to 10 items by placing them in your safe deposit box. Items in your safe deposit box will not be lost to a player who kills you, unlike those found in your bank. Remember that you can only place 10 single items into your safe deposit box, no stacks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I protect my stats in Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: You can protect your levels in up to 2 combat skills and 3 non-combat skills. You can choose which by opening your items lost on death interface found in your equipment tab. Choose wisely!

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: You should be warned however. If you get killed by a guard, you will lose a tenth of your experience in those skills too!

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Gelin over there also has some deals on insuring your hitpoints, speak to her to find out more about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are safe zones in Deadman mode?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Safe zones are areas patrolled by very high level guards which can be found in various places across the map. The guards watch out for any player with a PK skull and will attack them if they're spotted. It is still possible to be attacked inside safe zones but the person doing the attacking will not stand a chance of making it out alive.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Yes, I can help with that.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: You will no longer gain combat experience. Talk to me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: I've already stopped you from gaining combat experience, do you want to gain it again?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: You will now gain combat experience again. Talk to me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Yes, I can help with that.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: You will no longer gain hitpoints experience. Talk to me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: I've already stopped you from gaining hitpoints experience, do you want to gain it again?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: You will now gain hitpoints experience again. Talk to me again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I purchase some Deadman rewards?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Certainly! I have a number of unique rewards which you might be interested in.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Unfortunately the store is not currently available.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any spare blueprints to recolour my exit portal in my player-owned house?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Of course, here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, Nigel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, who are you?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: I'm Nigel. It is my job to tell you about Deadman Mode.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teleport me somewhere?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Sure, but I can only do so once per day. Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I don't want to go anywhere.

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: I can only do that once per day, [player name]. You've used your daily teleport already.

sections.title: Talking to Nigel after agreeing to convert

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Ah, I see you've changed your mind about transferring your account. Not to worry, I've cancelled that now. Can I help you with anything else?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Aha, blood money, the currency of a warrior! You must be rewarded! What would you like?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: More blood money! I commend you on your strength. What item would you like this time?

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: More blood money! Truly the blood lust is strong in you. Here, take this final item. You deserve it!

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: More blood money! I can only commend you on your prowess. Alas, I have no more armour to give to you at this time.

sections.title: Using Armageddon cape fabric on Nigel

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Bring me an imbued Zamorak, Guthix or Saradomin Cape and I'll give it a trim.

sections.title: Using Annihilation weapon scroll on Nigel

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: Bring me a Toxic Staff of the Dead, Bow of Faerdhinen (c) or Crystal armour and I'll give it a trim.

sections.title: Using Imbued godcapes on Nigel after having unlocked Deadman: Armageddon cape ornaments
Using weapons on Nigel after having unlocked Deadman: Armageddon weapon ornaments
Using Teleport option in Permanent Deadman worlds

lines.speaker: Nigel
lines.text: I cannot teleport you in this version of Deadman.
